{{CargoRelic
|name=Curator's Optical Magnifier
|class_id=20574
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a magnifier designed specifically for the curator, with an elegant and exquisite overall design. The frame is made of sturdy brass, and the magnifier lens is a high-precision optical glass, with edges slightly glowing blue. No subtle scratch can escape the curator's eyes.
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=30
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail DEF +1<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss2=Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail DEF +2<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss3=Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss4=Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000
|ss7=Per 1.5k Museum Medals gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Museum Medals Gained: 60000/60000<br> (Awakened)
}}
